productDisplayName: Puma Men Benecio Canvas White Casual Shoes
description: The Benecio canvas plimsole in white from puma is designed for the all-important purpose of you looking great while having fun. This pair is for those who want to make a bold statement without sacrificing on comfort and style. So throw on your favourite jeans, lace 'em up and hit the streets in real retro style.UpperCanvas upper with stitch detailing and black formstripe panelLace-up system for a snug and customised FitPadded collar and fabric inner for comfortBrand name on the tongue and brand logo on the collar for styleMidsolePU midsole with PU foxing for enhanced durability and styleBrand name badge on the heelOutsoleVulcanized rubber outsole with textured brand name grooves for flexibility and tractionshoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water
